name: AUTO Dine On Us - Pay to Stay, Dine on Us
externalName: Pay to Stay, Dine on Us
description: Enjoy £50 per night to spend on food and drinks, with our special 'Dine on Us' offer - where the Studio is on you, but the food and drinks are on us. Stay for a night or settle in for a long weekend. The longer you stay the more allowance you receive. Whether it’s dinner at the Canal Restaurant, cocktails on the terrace, a juice before a swim, or coffee on the move, simply charge your food and drinks to your studio and enjoy the freedom of spending your allowance whenever you choose during your stay. • This 1-night rate includes a £50 Food & Drinks credit per booking. • Allowance must be used during the stay and cannot be transferred, redeemed for cash, or carried over to future bookings. • Available for stays in January & February only. • Full payment required at the time of booking. Non-refundable and non-amendable.

Unwind and unplug, with full use of the pool, gym, sauna and steam, and enjoy access to all spaces including Canal Restaurant, our Cinema Room, Listening Lounge and 10th Floor Guest Lounge with twinkling views over London. name: AUTO M&F Soft Reset - Treatment, Dinner & Stay
externalName: M&F Soft Reset - Treatment, Dinner & Stay
description: Give the gift of a new year's reset to your favourite person, or treat yourself to some ‘me time’, with our exclusive SOFT RESET Package. Designed to restore balance after the festive season, this stay combines great food, restorative rest and a touch of self-care. Available exclusively throughout January and February. Settle into a private en-suite studio, spend your first evening in Canal restaurant with a £50 credit towards food & drink, with a help-yourself breakfast in the morning. A 30-minute treatment for one or two during your stay - with 'The Grounding' full-body Massage, Deep Roots Massage or 'From The Ground Up' treatments to choose from. The perfect way to ease into the year feeling lighter and brighter. This rate includes: • Overnight stay with breakfast • £50 credit for food & drink in Canal restaurant - must be used on your first evening of your stay • A 30-minute treatment for one or two during your stay - our team will reach out to book a time to suit • Available for stays in January & February only • Full payment required at the time of booking. Non-refundable and non-amendable
